title: yes, and?
why_this_song: yes, and? by Ariana Grande (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Now I'm so done with caring
What you think, no, I won't hide
My tongue is sacred, I speak upon what I like
Protected, sexy, discerning with my time (my time)
Your energy is yours and mine is mine (mine is mine)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "chest" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "chest" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shit" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shit" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: What you think, no, I won't hide
Protected, sexy, discerning with my time (my time)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Ariana Grande one question about "yes, and?", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Ariana Grande sobre "yes, and?", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "yes, and?" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "yes, and?" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "yes, and?" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "yes, and?" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "yes, and?" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "yes, and?" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
